title: NVDA AI Demand
hypothesis: AI infrastructure demand continues to support NVDA data center revenue growth.

evidence.text: Management commentary indicates continued demand for accelerated computing capacity.
Cloud capex plans from major customers remain elevated.
Export restrictions remain a potential headwind for China-related revenue.

watchlist.why: Confirms whether AI accelerator demand is still translating into reported revenue
Tests whether major customers are still expanding AI infrastructure budgets
watchlist.source_hint: Earnings calls from MSFT, AMZN, GOOGL, META

updates.summary: Support score 2.3, counter score 0.7, neutral evidence 0. Net evidence points to 'strengthened'.
